prompt: Create one readable video prompt sheet for this exact ordered shot group. Layout: two numbered panels in order, each with an image frame and compact metadata below. Panel 1 / Shot 3: medium close-up, low angle, hand-held micro push-in; Elise raises the torn petition at the market doorway; short telephoto, shallow focus; audio note: crowd chant softens under her breath. Panel 2 / Shot 4: over-the-shoulder from Lucas toward Elise, slight hand-held sway; Lucas listens as the crowd compresses behind him; normal lens, natural focus falloff; audio note: ambient street sound drops. Include camera arrows for the push-in and sway. Do not add shots, durations, dialogue, music, or transitions not listed here. Keep all text legible.
title: Shots 3-4 ordered video prompt sheet
